title: One of the stolen bakkies of George Municipality found in EC
description: GEORGE NEWS - One of the two brand-new Isuzu...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - One of the two brand-new Isuzu bakkies that were stolen at the municipal premises in Mitchell Street on 5 April has been recovered in the Eastern Cape.


> The vehicle was allegedly found in East London in late April.


Police did not divulge any information on the progress of the theft investigation or the recovery of the vehicle, and did not confirm whether any arrests had been made.Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies told George Herald that no further information is available at this stage as the matter is subject to an ongoing investigation.Members of the George Vehicle Identification and Safeguarding Unit (VIS) are investigating the matter.Police previously arrested two men for the theft at the municipal premises, but both men were released due to insufficient evidence.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
